betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6High-Performance Solvent§f is the best acidizer solvent for §bmaximum bedrock ore yields§f.

§eCrafting:§f
• Made in §bIndustrial Mixer§f from:
• §bReformate Gas§f (from Vacuum Refinery) + §bChlorine§f
• Can also be obtained from certain §bRBMK§f processes

§eUnlocks in Ore Acidizer:§f
• §bBismuth§f - rare heavy metal for advanced alloys
• §bTechnetium-99§f - nuclear waste product for electronics
• Other rare materials unavailable with lower solvents

§eAcidizer Tips:§f
• Install §bEffectiveness 3 upgrade§f on Acidizer to reduce solvent consumption (important for expensive Fullerene recipes)
• Higher yields justify the complex production chain

§aTip:§f This represents the peak of bedrock ore processing - set up the Reformate Gas production line for end-game material access.
